title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she prepares for the Japanese Derby, the
second race of the Triple Crown tour, her eyes
are on first prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But someone is already in the paddock receiving
louder cheers than her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That someone is none other than Special Week,
who is striving to become the best in Japan for
her mothers.
